channel.title: 熊的好奇電台
channel.itunes:author: 曹建雄 Bear
channel.description: 急診醫師 Bear 策展，AI 研究＋查證後，用對談把各種主題講清楚。醫學、時事、知識——什麼好奇就聊什麼。
channel.itunes:summary: Bear 的好奇心電台：任何主題經 AI 研究＋對抗式查核後，做成好聽的對談，帶你快速搞懂。

item.title: EP01 美伊關係現況：三個月戰爭後的停火草案
item.description:
美伊關係現況——三個月戰爭後的停火草案。從近期戰爭時間線、核問題與制裁、荷莫茲海峽與全球油價，到最新的外交談判草案，一次講清楚。

⚠️ 本集內容由 AI 多來源研究＋對抗式查核後、以 AI 對談形式製作，僅供參考、不構成專業建議。引用來源（31 筆）如下，歡迎自行查證：

  • [2026-05-28] Iran peace deal hinges on Trump approval (MOU draft) — link
  • [2026-05-29] Trump's 'room to maneuver' narrows as US-Iran close in on framework deal — link
  • [2025-06-14] Iran says nuclear talks with US meaningless as Trump pushes for a deal (6th round cancelled) — link
  • [2025-09-27] Impending deadline for UN action on Iran: what the snapback of Iran sanctions could mean — link
  • [2026-02-15] 2025–2026 Iranian protests (cross-check) — link
  • [2026-05-26] 2026 Iran war (Operation Epic Fury, casualties, blockade, oil) — link
  • [2026-04-28] 2026 Minab school attack — link
  • [2026-03] Mojtaba Khamenei chosen as successor — link
  • [2026-05-04] US intelligence indicates limited new damage to Iran's nuclear program — link
  • [2026-03] Grossi: reconstruction 'very possible', you cannot unlearn what you've learned — link
  • [2026-05-22] Iran's enriched uranium stockpile: can it be safely transferred? — link
  • [2026-05-21] Supreme leader says enriched uranium must stay in Iran — link
  • [2026-05-18] Pakistan's mediation faces limits as Iran-US tensions deepen — link
  • [2026-02-25] US issues new sanctions as it dials up pressure on Iran (12 vessels) — link
  • [2026-05-28] US imposes sanctions on Iranian agency controlling Strait of Hormuz shipping — link
  • [2026-05-26] US naval blockade: 108 vessels redirected (CENTCOM) — link
  • [2026] Strait of Hormuz closure risks greatest global energy supply shock in decades — link
  • [2026-04-13] Von der Leyen statement: EUR 22bn higher fossil fuel bill in 44 days — link
  • [2026-05-07] Strait of Hormuz crisis: fertilizer scarcity will affect next harvests (FAO) — link
  • [2026-05-22] Congressional report tallies 42 US aircraft lost or damaged in Operation Epic Fury — link
  • [2026-03-29] Houthi missile attack on Israel raises Red Sea shipping concerns — link
  • [2026-05-26] Israel expands ground operation in south Lebanon; cumulative toll — link
  • [2026-05-19] Soufan Center IntelBrief (Kataib Hezbollah commander arrest) — link
  • [2026-02-26] 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations (Oman/Geneva mediation) — link
  • [2026-04-11] US-Iran talks set to begin in Islamabad (Vance-Ghalibaf, 21 hours) — link
  • [2026-05-28] GOP lawmakers pressure Trump on Iran (Graham, Wicker) — link
  • [2026-05-27] Why a US-Iran deal no longer matters (MOU vs JCPOA, Farsi) — link
  • [2026-05-24] Iran International: US obstructing asset unfreezing; $12bn Qatar precondition — link
  • [2026-04-09] Iran war ceasefire: Tehran crowds wave flags, state media calls it victory — link
  • [2026-05-28] Kalshi: US-Iran nuclear deal prediction market — link
  • [2026-03-25] How Trump's Iran war objectives have shifted over time — link
item.content:encoded:
美伊關係現況——三個月戰爭後的停火草案。從近期戰爭時間線、核問題與制裁、荷莫茲海峽與全球油價，到最新的外交談判草案，一次講清楚。

⚠️ 本集內容由 AI 多來源研究＋對抗式查核後、以 AI 對談形式製作，僅供參考、不構成專業建議。引用來源（31 筆）如下，歡迎自行查證：

  • [2026-05-28] Iran peace deal hinges on Trump approval (MOU draft) — link
  • [2026-05-29] Trump's 'room to maneuver' narrows as US-Iran close in on framework deal — link
  • [2025-06-14] Iran says nuclear talks with US meaningless as Trump pushes for a deal (6th round cancelled) — link
  • [2025-09-27] Impending deadline for UN action on Iran: what the snapback of Iran sanctions could mean — link
  • [2026-02-15] 2025–2026 Iranian protests (cross-check) — link
  • [2026-05-26] 2026 Iran war (Operation Epic Fury, casualties, blockade, oil) — link
  • [2026-04-28] 2026 Minab school attack — link
  • [2026-03] Mojtaba Khamenei chosen as successor — link
  • [2026-05-04] US intelligence indicates limited new damage to Iran's nuclear program — link
  • [2026-03] Grossi: reconstruction 'very possible', you cannot unlearn what you've learned — link
  • [2026-05-22] Iran's enriched uranium stockpile: can it be safely transferred? — link
  • [2026-05-21] Supreme leader says enriched uranium must stay in Iran — link
  • [2026-05-18] Pakistan's mediation faces limits as Iran-US tensions deepen — link
  • [2026-02-25] US issues new sanctions as it dials up pressure on Iran (12 vessels) — link
  • [2026-05-28] US imposes sanctions on Iranian agency controlling Strait of Hormuz shipping — link
  • [2026-05-26] US naval blockade: 108 vessels redirected (CENTCOM) — link
  • [2026] Strait of Hormuz closure risks greatest global energy supply shock in decades — link
  • [2026-04-13] Von der Leyen statement: EUR 22bn higher fossil fuel bill in 44 days — link
  • [2026-05-07] Strait of Hormuz crisis: fertilizer scarcity will affect next harvests (FAO) — link
  • [2026-05-22] Congressional report tallies 42 US aircraft lost or damaged in Operation Epic Fury — link
  • [2026-03-29] Houthi missile attack on Israel raises Red Sea shipping concerns — link
  • [2026-05-26] Israel expands ground operation in south Lebanon; cumulative toll — link
  • [2026-05-19] Soufan Center IntelBrief (Kataib Hezbollah commander arrest) — link
  • [2026-02-26] 2025–2026 Iran–United States negotiations (Oman/Geneva mediation) — link
  • [2026-04-11] US-Iran talks set to begin in Islamabad (Vance-Ghalibaf, 21 hours) — link
  • [2026-05-28] GOP lawmakers pressure Trump on Iran (Graham, Wicker) — link
  • [2026-05-27] Why a US-Iran deal no longer matters (MOU vs JCPOA, Farsi) — link
  • [2026-05-24] Iran International: US obstructing asset unfreezing; $12bn Qatar precondition — link
  • [2026-04-09] Iran war ceasefire: Tehran crowds wave flags, state media calls it victory — link
  • [2026-05-28] Kalshi: US-Iran nuclear deal prediction market — link
  • [2026-03-25] How Trump's Iran war objectives have shifted over time — link
